attach_raw_mapi_check.label.message: Allega le proprietà MAPI (Messaging Application Programming Interface)

direct_to_calendar_check.label.message: Apre direttamente i dati del Calendario

disable_filename_character_set_check.lab.message: Disabilita la conversione del set di caratteri del nome del file

extensionDescription.message: LookOut è in grado di leggere e inserire nei messaggi di posta le parti codificate in TNEF (Transport Neutral Encapsulation Format).

strict_contenttype_check.label.message: Richiede una rigida corrispondenza nel tipo di contenuto

attach_raw_mapi_check.hint.message: Attach a plain-text dump of raw MAPI properties alongside the decoded files.

direct_to_calendar_check.hint.message: Automatically open calendar invitations and contact cards without saving them first.

disable_filename_character_set_check.hin.message: Skip the OEM code-page → Unicode conversion of attachment filenames. Enable if filenames look garbled.

remove_winmail_dat_check.hint.message: Hide the raw winmail.dat attachment after its contents have been extracted.

strict_contenttype_check.hint.message: Only process attachments named "winmail.dat" or with content-type application/ms-tnef.

enable_debug_check.hint.message: Write verbose [LookOut] messages to the browser console.
